title: lithocarpus leiophyllus
intro: Lithocarpus leiophyllus, also known as the Taiwan cork oak, is a species of tree in the beech family (Fagaceae) native to Taiwan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus leiophyllus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent the formation of blood clots. Lithocarpus leiophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
